key_insight: The paper uses thermo-mechanical simulation to compare conditions that trigger flash formation in inertia friction welding of FGH98 powder superalloy.
engineering_relevance: It helps welding engineers screen process windows that reduce defects and improve joint quality in high-performance superalloy joining.
method: Build a thermo-mechanical model of inertia friction welding.
Compare candidate welding conditions to identify flash-formation tendencies.
Use the screening results to assess process robustness for FGH98 powder superalloy.
evidence_signal: The abstract indicates a simulation-based comparative screening study published as a journal article in Welding in the World, but it does not provide quantitative results in the supplied metadata.
watch_item: Because the provided abstract is very limited, the exact model assumptions and experimental validation depth are unclear.
paper_title: Thermo-mechanical simulation and comparative screening of flash formation in inertia friction welding of FGH98 powder superalloy
